findings.title: Closeout evidence pack for cp00-026 not yet present (expected pre-evidence state)
findings.details: Final validation (npm run rp00:control-plane:validate) will fail until docs/closeout-packs/cp00-026/{manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json} exist. The newly added construction-inspection check requires construction-inspection.json to set control_plane_synthetic_fixture_set_idempotency_key_handling_verified === true. This is the expected pre-evidence failure called out by the caller and the only blocker before final validation; it is not a code defect.
findings.recommendation: Generate the cp00-026 evidence pack (manifest, command-evidence, this claude-review-result, adjudication, and construction-inspection.json with control_plane_synthetic_fixture_set_idempotency_key_handling_verified: true), then re-run the contract validator to confirm green.
findings.adjudication_detail: The CP00-026 evidence pack is generated with manifest, command evidence, Claude review, adjudication, and construction inspection containing the required production-ready flag.

findings.title: Declared idempotencyKeyPattern is asserted-as-string but not applied within this unit (delegated to shared helpers)
findings.details: policy.idempotencyKeyPattern (^idem\.synthetic\.[a-z0-9._:-]{1,113}$) is checked only as a literal string in the policy/contract/validator assertions; it is never compiled into a RegExp or applied to actual keys here. Real key validation is delegated to the shared normalizeOptionalSyntheticIdempotencyKey (precheck) and assertSyntheticIdempotencyKey (result validator). Behavior is correct and dual-gated (tests confirm uppercase 'idem.synthetic.Invalid' is rejected and the default/explicit synthetic keys are accepted), and this mirrors the precedent Hermes idempotency unit. The only residual risk is documentation drift if the shared helper's internal pattern ever diverges from the declared string. Non-blocking.
findings.recommendation: Optional: either derive the shared helper's bound from this declared pattern (single source of truth) or add a comment noting that idempotencyKeyPattern is declarative metadata enforced by the shared synthetic-key helpers, to prevent future drift.
findings.adjudication_detail: The declared idempotencyKeyPattern remains declarative metadata while runtime behavior is enforced by normalizeOptionalSyntheticIdempotencyKey, assertSyntheticIdempotencyKey, service tests, fixture equality, and RP00 validation. A future schema clarity pack may consolidate the pattern into a single source of truth.

security_notes: Claude found the S10 metadata-only no-write guarantee holds.
Claude found no P0/P1/P2 issues and no production_ready blocker after evidence generation.
test_notes: CP00-026 records one valid pack-level Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review.
raw_review.summary: Claude reported two nonblocking P3 findings. The missing evidence pack is resolved by generating CP00-026 evidence before final validation; the declarative idempotencyKeyPattern note is deferred as nonblocking schema clarity because shared synthetic-key helpers and tests enforce runtime behavior. Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 after adjudication is 0.
